title: Love in a Small Town
summary: Love in a Small Town is the third studio album by American country music artist K. T. Oslin, released by RCA Records on November 6, 1990. "Two Hearts", "Come Next Monday", "Mary and Willie", "You Call Everybody Darling" and "Cornell Crawford" were released as singles. The album reached No. 5 on the Top Country Albums chart and has been certified Gold by the RIAA.
text:
Love in a Small Town is the third studio album by American country music artist K. T. Oslin, released by RCA Records on November 6, 1990. "Two Hearts", "Come Next Monday", "Mary and Willie", "You Call Everybody Darling" and "Cornell Crawford" were released as singles. The album reached No. 5 on the Top Country Albums chart and has been certified Gold by the RIAA.

Track listing

Compiled from liner notes.

Barry Beckett - keyboards

Dino Zimmerman - electric guitar
